content: *도구, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 5 lbs **가치:** 5 GP --- **능력:** 민첩 {color="red"} **활용:** 가죽 제품에 문양 추가 (DC 10) {color="red"} **제작:** [무릿매](/212f7f5a1e80818da898c6af13b4dbc3?pvs=25), [채찍](/212f7f5a1e80812f909bff0e458cfd78?pvs=25), [가죽 갑옷](/212f7f5a1e808152812dd020d04a9b04?pvs=25), [징 박힌 가죽 갑옷](/212f7f5a1e80810abae9fe4d9075c3fd?pvs=25), [배낭](/212f7f5a1e808113a699d64caf25e4ab?pvs=25), [석궁 볼트 통](/212f7f5a1e8081be98d0f63225e137d2?pvs=25), [지도나 두루마리 통](/212f7f5a1e80811ab312f24d090b7e78?pvs=25), [양피지](/212f7f5a1e8081aa8340e1a781812e1a?pvs=25), [주머니](/212f7f5a1e8081548b6dc2eadf45eedb?pvs=25), [화살통](/212f7f5a1e80812ea15ec5297a76264c?pvs=25), [가죽물통](/212f7f5a1e80815da95ac2b204f7677f?pvs=25) {color="red"}
